question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 30.80% on 2026-04-25 for the Metaculus question "Will the United States experience negative GDP growth during Q1, Q2, or Q3 2026?"?
summary: Meta-prediction on whether Metaculus CP for US negative GDP growth exceeds 30.80% by April 25. The threshold equals the current CP, so even a small upward move resolves YES. The Iran war ceasefire expires ~April 22 (3 days before resolution) with peace talks already failed, a US naval blockade of Iran just began, and Trump threatened 50% China tariffs — all on April 13, likely not fully priced in. The upward CP trend (26%→34% over the past month) and asymmetric catalyst risks (more events could push CP up than down) favor YES. Monte Carlo simulation and scenario analysis both converge around 65%.

factors.description: Ceasefire expires ~April 22, just before resolution date. If war resumes, recession fears surge and CP jumps well above threshold. Failed peace talks on April 11 make extension less likely.
US naval blockade of Iran ports began April 13 and Trump threatened 50% China tariffs same day - these bearish economic developments may not be fully priced into the 30.80% CP reading
CP trend has been generally upward (26% -> 34% over month), with only the ceasefire announcement causing a pullback. Underlying trajectory favors higher CP.
GDPNow declining from 3.1% to 1.3% for Q1; next update April 21 could show further decline, prompting forecaster updates
CP recently pulled back from 34% to 30.80%, showing ceasefire provided temporary relief. If ceasefire is extended or peace deal emerges, CP could stay below threshold.
Large forecaster base (803) provides stability - CP won't swing wildly on minor news. Threshold is the exact current value, so even small upward moves count.

reasoning:
**Final forecast: 0.65 (65% probability YES)**

The core reasoning is that the threshold is set at the current CP level, creating an asymmetric situation where any upward pressure resolves YES. With the ceasefire expiring 3 days before resolution, failed peace talks, an ongoing naval blockade, and new tariff threats, there are substantially more upward catalysts than downward ones in the remaining 11 days.

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/41089) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-04-25 19:19:02 is higher than 30.80%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 30.80%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-04-25 19:19:02, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
